text.title: Dependency-Adoption Output Contract
text.summary: The methodology produces one markdown file per adopted direct dependency, committed in the PR that introduces the dep.

list.item: docs/dependencies/<dep-name>.md OR deps/<dep-name>.md — convention chosen once per repo and recorded in CONTRIBUTING.md.
dependency — package name as it appears in the registry.
version_pin — exact version + integrity hash if applicable.
manifest — file path of declaration (package.json, pyproject.toml, etc.).
sbom_entry — confirmation: SBOM file path + timestamp of CI check.
escape_hatch — replacement candidates + migration outline (3 bullets).
risk_notes — maintenance health, BUS-factor, license, known CVEs.
linked_decision — link to the trade-off / security review that approved adoption.

antipattern.description: Manifest uses caret/tilde range for the new dep.
Escape-hatch section is left empty or contains only generic advice ("fork if abandoned").
antipattern.reason: Violates r4. Escape hatch is meant to be concrete and actionable.

antipattern.description: renewal_review > 24 months out for a runtime dep with high blast radius.
antipattern.reason: Renewal cadence must reflect risk. High-risk runtime deps re-review yearly.

list.item: File exists at the agreed location.
Version pin is exact in manifest AND lockfile.
SBOM CI check passed for the introducing PR.
Escape hatch lists >= 1 replacement candidate with migration outline.
